parsing_rationale: The document is a comprehensive task list for the CourseHub API implementation. I have extracted the structural phases as 'phase' elements and the specific checklist items as 'task' or 'sub_task' elements. The dependency graph provided in the markdown was used to build the relationship arcs. The test criteria from each section were mapped to 'test_case' and 'acceptance_criterion' elements to ensure full traceability from implementation to validation.

project_info.brief_explanation: Technical implementation plan for a course management API including auth, enrollment, and progress tracking.
project_info.source_context: Task list derived from spec.md and plan.md

sections.title: Implementation Strategy
sections.raw_content:
This task list follows a dependency-ordered, phase-based approach:

1. **Phase 1 (Setup)**: Project initialization, database schema, migrations
2. **Phase 2 (Foundation)**: Auth layer with JWT and role-based access control
3. **Phase 3 (Integration)**: Resend email service via BackgroundTask
4. **Phase 4 (Domain - US1)**: Instructor course management (CRUD, ownership, deletion constraint)
5. **Phase 5 (Domain - US2)**: Student registration, enrollment, discovery
6. **Phase 6 (Domain - US3)**: Progress tracking and student data isolation
7. **Phase 7 (Testing)**: Comprehensive test suite and coverage validation
8. **Phase 8 (Polish)**: Error handling, response envelope, observability

Each phase is independently testable. Phases 4–6 map to user stories and can be developed in parallel after Phase 3.

---

sections.title: Phase 1: Project Setup & Database Schema
sections.raw_content: - [ ] T001 Create project structure... [Full Content] ...AsyncSession can be created and cleaned up without errors

sections.title: Phase 2: Auth Router & JWT Flow
sections.raw_content: - [ ] T009 Create `app/core/security.py`... [Full Content] ...Refresh token expires after 7 days (verify JWT exp claim)

sections.title: Phase 3: Resend Email Integration & BackgroundTask
sections.raw_content: - [ ] T015 Create `app/services/email.py`... [Full Content] ...Missing RESEND_API_KEY raises ConfigError at startup (not at request time)

sections.title: Phase 4: Courses Router — Instructor Management (US1)
sections.raw_content: **User Story**: Instructor manages courses... [Full Content] ...DELETE without enrollments succeeds (204)

sections.title: Phase 5: Enrollments Router — Student Discovery & Enrollment (US2)
sections.raw_content: **User Story**: Student registers and enrols... [Full Content] ...Progress == 100 auto-sets completed_at (200)

sections.title: Phase 6: Progress Tracking & Data Isolation (US3)
sections.raw_content: **User Story**: Progress is tracked and exposed safely... [Full Content] ...Student cannot update another student's progress (403)

sections.title: Phase 7: Testing & Coverage
sections.raw_content: - [ ] T027 Create `tests/conftest.py`... [Full Content] ...No mocking of PostgreSQL; uses real test instance

sections.title: Phase 8: Response Envelope & Error Handling
sections.raw_content: - [ ] T033 [P] Create global exception handler... [Full Content] ...Envelope format consistent across all endpoints

sections.title: Dependency Graph
sections.raw_content: Phase 1 (Setup) -> Phase 2 (Auth) -> Phase 3 (Email) -> [Phase 4, 5] -> Phase 6 -> Phase 7 -> Phase 8

sections.title: Success Criteria
sections.raw_content: - All 36 tasks completed... [Full Content] ...HTTP status codes match contract

sections.title: MVP Scope (Phase 1 Delivery)
sections.raw_content: For a minimal viable product, focus on: Phases 1–3, Phase 4, Phase 5, Phase 7

elements.content: Create project structure: app/, app/core/, etc.
Define ORM models: User, Course, Module, Enrollment
Implement async welcome email service using Resend SDK
Implement Course CRUD endpoints for instructors
Prevent course deletion if active enrollments exist

elements.source_section: Phase 5: Enrollments Router — Student Discovery & Enrollment (US2)

elements.content: End-to-end workflow: Register -> Create Course -> Enroll -> Progress
Implement global exception handler and APIResponse envelope

structural_gaps.remediation_advice: The document is very detailed; however, no specific open questions were listed. Check if any edge cases for the Resend API are unknown.
